snapshot.scope: Independent Product Planning review binds exact Reader selection identity, read action, reversible transform, safe presentation and exceptional bounded review candidate 84d2d33 to API, recovery, architecture, data, UI and trace owners without changing implementation bytes or promoting Requirement, Exit or Phase status.

reviewers.task: Reader selection mutation and safe presentation contract synchronization
reviewers.independence: Product Planning did not author the implementation candidate and independently compared its contracts, schemas, Main services, renderer projection, recovery behavior and focused evidence before synchronizing owner documents and governance manifests.

dimensions.summary: Existing API, Job/recovery, architecture, data and UI owners carry the Reader selection vertical; no duplicate design owner or unrelated Activity contract was introduced.

Renderer-local endpoints resolve to Main-owned hash/span identity; selected bodies and replacements stay out of IPC presentation, while Host instructions and localized safe presentation remain distinct.

Exact focused, type, build and UI-contract gates cover identity, read actions, mutation, recovery and bounded review without changing Requirement, Exit or Phase status or claiming held real-raster evidence.
Focused regressions cover stale identity, bounded context, durable retry/adoption, reversible Operation/Undo, exceptional proposal CAS and safe timeline presentation.
The semantic change is synchronized into existing owner sections and trace manifests; no new design document, decision record, Activity candidate or broad status rewrite was added.

verification.command: Independent implementation and owner-contract review of Reader selection candidate 84d2d33
verification.evidence: Review covers exact contracts/schemas, resolve/action/transform/proposal services, Job/conversation recovery, renderer binding and focused tests; this Planning commit changes documentation/governance only.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:traceability
verification.evidence: Owner links, trace semantics, whitespace, document map, PRD structure and decision records pass without Requirement, Exit or Phase promotion.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:independent-documentation-review && npm run verify:documentation-leanness
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004 remain green and the recipe binds governed owners plus exact Reader services/UI/tests without exposing selected bodies or changing implementation bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: Reader selection mutation and safe presentation Planning synchronization
coordination.compatibility: The candidate confines selection authority to Main-resolved identity, keeps replacement/apply authority out of renderer, and uses a dedicated bounded Reader proposal projection without changing legacy generic proposal IPC.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning reviewed exact 84d2d33 implementation/evidence and synchronized only its owner contracts and trace facts; Activity integration and broader Note Agent mutation remain separate.

nonBlockingRisks: Post-repair real macOS raster evidence is held because desktop control was unavailable; focused renderer and interaction tests pass, but no raster PASS is inferred.
Broader Note Agent mutations, complete Activity/Undo routing, generic exception coverage and Windows evidence remain open; no Requirement, Exit or Phase status is promoted.
